name: 开放小说创作助手
examples_zh: 把一句"修仙门派遭遇灵气枯竭"的想法扩展成中文长篇小说的世界观、主线和分卷规划
为我的玄幻小说生成20章章节规划，并标注每章目标、冲突和钩子
评审第8章文本，指出节奏、人物动机和伏笔回收问题，并给出修订方案
examples_en: Turn the idea of a sect facing spiritual-energy collapse into a Chinese long-form novel world, main plot, and volume plan
Generate a 20-chapter plan for my xuanhuan novel with goals, conflicts, and hooks for each chapter
Review chapter 8 for pacing, character motivation, and foreshadowing payoff, then suggest revisions
